zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Alice Eginton於1604年出生在英國多瑟特維姆斯時，她的父親M Egington24歲，母親Mary Bennett23歲。她於1622年10月27日與Edward Bennett在英國斯塔福爾瑟格利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1674年5月14日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布里斯托雷沃斯享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Alice Eginton于1604年出生在英国多瑟特維姆斯时，她的父亲M Egington24岁，母亲Mary Bennett23岁。她于1622年10月27日与Edward Bennett在英国斯塔福爾瑟格利结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1674年5月14日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布里斯托雷沃斯享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eginton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Edgington
meanings: English: habitational name from Egginton (Derbyshire), Edgington in Pyrton (Oxfordshire), or Eggington (Bedfordshire). Egginton in Derbyshire means an ‘estate associated with a man named Ecga’, from the Old English personal name Ecga + ing, denoting association, + tūn ‘estate, farmstead’, while Eggington in Bedfordshire arises from the genitive of the Old English personal name Ecca + dūn ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Alice Eginton was born in 1604, in Weymouth, Dorset, England, her father, M Egington, was 24 and her mother, Mary Bennett, was 23. She married Edward Bennett on 27 October 1622, in Sedgley, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 14 May 1674, in Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Alice Eginton est née en 1604, à Weymouth, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, M Egington, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Mary Bennett, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Bennett le 27 octobre 1622, à Sedgley, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 mai 1674, à Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Alice Eginton 1604 in Weymouth, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater M Egington 24 und ihre Mutter Mary Bennett 23. Sie hat am 27. Oktober 1622 in Sedgley, Staffordshire, England Edward Bennett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. Mai 1674 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Alice Eginton è nata il nel 1604 nel Weymouth, Dorset, England, sua padre, M Egington, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Mary Bennett, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Edward Bennett il 27 ottobre 1622, nel Sedgley, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 14 maggio 1674, nel Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Alice Egintonが1604年にイギリスドールセトウエイモウスで生まれた時，父M Egingtonは24歳，母Mary Bennettは23歳であった。1622年10月27日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアセドグリーでEdward Bennettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1674年5月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーブリストルレhオボスで70歳で死去した。

ko.Rehoboth, Plymouth Colony, British Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 브리스톨 레홉스
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Alice Eginton(이)가 1604년 영국 도르세트 베이모우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 M Egington(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Bennett(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1622년 10월 27일 영국 스태퍼드실르 세지리에서 Edward Bennett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1674년 5월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 브리스톨 레홉스에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Alice Eginton nasceu em 1604, em Weymouth, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, M Egington, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Mary Bennett, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Edward Bennett em 27 de outubro de 1622, em Sedgley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de maio de 1674, em Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Alice Eginton родилась в 1604 г. в местности вимоут, дорсет, Англия, её отцу по имени M Egington было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Bennett, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Bennett 27 октября 1622 г. в местности седжли, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 14 мая 1674 г. в местности рэобот, бристол, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Alice Eginton nació en 1604, en Weymouth, Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, M Egington, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Mary Bennett, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Edward Bennett el 27 de octubre de 1622, en Sedgley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 14 de mayo de 1674, en Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 70 años.
